01-ai-sales-revolution.instruction: List 5 weekly sales tasks that are repetitive. Rate each: automation potential (high/medium/low) and why.
01-ai-sales-revolution.successMessage: Your sales automation hit list. Start with the highs.

02-lead-research-and-qualification.instruction: Write a prompt to research and qualify a company as a lead. Include info to gather, qualification criteria, output format.

03-outreach-that-converts.instruction: Write a prompt for a personalized cold outreach email. Include prospect context, value prop, hook, and soft CTA.
03-outreach-that-converts.successMessage: Personalization at scale. Generic outreach is dead.

04-sales-calls-and-meetings.instruction: Write a prompt for a pre-call brief: company research, key stakeholders, likely objections, conversation starters.
04-sales-calls-and-meetings.successMessage: Walking in prepared is the difference between closing and losing.

05-proposal-and-pitch-creation.instruction: Write a prompt for a tailored proposal outline: pain points, your solution, pricing approach, ROI projection.
05-proposal-and-pitch-creation.successMessage: Custom proposals win deals. AI makes customization effortless.

06-objection-handling.instruction: Generate responses to the 5 most common objections in your industry. Each: acknowledge, reframe, evidence.
06-objection-handling.successMessage: Polished objection responses ready. Never freeze again.

07-pipeline-management.instruction: Design AI-powered pipeline review: how AI analyzes deals and flags what needs attention, is at risk, or ready to close.
07-pipeline-management.successMessage: AI catches deals you'd miss in manual review.

08-customer-success-with-ai.instruction: Write a prompt to analyze customer usage data, generate a health score, and recommend actions.
08-customer-success-with-ai.successMessage: Proactive AI-powered customer success prevents churn.

09-sales-analytics.instruction: Write a prompt to analyze sales data and surface insights. Include data available, questions to answer, output format.
09-sales-analytics.successMessage: Data-driven sales decisions beat gut instinct.

10-your-ai-sales-system.instruction: Design your complete AI sales system: map each stage (prospecting, outreach, meetings, proposals, closing, post-sale) and what AI handles.
10-your-ai-sales-system.successMessage: End-to-end AI sales system. This is how top performers scale.
